textByHashes.27a6247d57f76cebca476e49487187049948a747: ' But there's no way I'm giving any to you.
textByHashes.210dfbb906eb4dc79acf6d9c816d3d0cb5677f52: ' Nope. Only real builders can wear builders' boots, and you're not even close.
textByHashes.b02df3a80d962105801f0fc10d34442e7817b3ce: Don't suppose you've seen any boots around here? Size nine, steel toed, brown leather...
textByHashes.8a196c472e8e40aedad792c7e6d1668880d18151: They don't call me 'No-fingers' for nothing!
textByHashes.8770ca1f283f94e68c37b666e14ac01c9e92d195: It may seem that way mate, but I think you'll find I don't have any.
textByHashes.74b7e3ea2b44618abe22f2c95ded408539de3f23: These not be fingers. These 'ere be wooden fingers.
